ast.source: Failed to initialize Completed Task Display UI:
ast.target: 初始化已完成任务显示界面失败：

ast.name: error
ast.source: Failed to load Completed Task Display plugin:
ast.target: 加载已完成任务显示插件失败：

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display 'Hiding/Showing Completed Tasks' in the status bar
ast.target: 在状态栏显示“隐藏/显示已完成任务”

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: In Edit/Live Preview mode: hide sub-bullets (indented items) beneath completed tasks. Note: In Reading view, sub-bullets are automatically hidden with their parent task.
ast.target: 在编辑/实时预览模式下：隐藏已完成任务下方的子项目（缩进项）。注意：在阅读视图中，子项目会随其父任务自动隐藏。
